name: Fernwood Country Club
description: Fernwood Country Club is a place to play pickleball in McComb, MS. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: FitLife SportsPlex
description: FitLife SportsPlex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McComb, MS. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
